# SciNest · 科研小棉袄
> A continuous research creation workspace for turning project materials into editable writing, scientific figures and presentations.

## Site Info
- URL: https://scinest-ai.vercel.app
- Languages: zh-CN, en
- Operator: Jiaempower Pathways Limited
- Category: Research Productivity Software

## Key Pages
- / : Chinese SciNest landing page
- /en : English SciNest landing page
- /api/ai/summary : Machine-readable product summary
- /api/ai/faq : Structured product FAQ
- /api/ai/service : Capabilities, pricing and usage boundaries

## What SciNest Does
1. Keeps papers, references, notes and project materials connected inside one research project.
2. Helps structure, draft and revise long-form research writing while preserving editable content.
3. Creates scientific figure plans and editable figure outputs for continued refinement.
4. Produces editable presentation content and slides from the same project context.

## Product Model
- Founding licence: ¥299 or US$49.
- Standard reference price: ¥399 or US$69.
- Includes 12 months of feature updates; the purchased version remains usable afterward.
- Model provider API usage charges, where applicable, are separate.
- A 7-day trial is available through the current trial entry flow.

## Data and Model Boundary
- SciNest is designed as a local project workspace.
- Project files remain local by default.
- Tasks that use an AI model are sent to the model provider selected and configured by the user.
- SciNest does not claim that all processing always remains on-device.

## Intended Users
Researchers, postgraduate students, academics and technical professionals who need one continuous workflow from research materials to writing, scientific figures and editable presentations.

## Important Limits
- SciNest does not guarantee publication, journal acceptance or academic outcomes.
- It does not claim guaranteed Nature, Science or Cell quality.
- Generated writing, figures and presentations require user review and editing.
